chunks.title: Preparation for the Coronation
chunks.reason: Describes Jehoiada's covenant with commanders and the organization of Levite guards.

chunks.title: Coronation and Overthrow of Athaliah
chunks.reason: Narrates the crowning of Joash, Athaliah's discovery, and her execution.

chunks.title: Covenant Renewal and Worship Restoration
chunks.reason: Details the covenant between people and God, destruction of Baal's temple, and restoration of priestly duties.
